tighten_record.reviewer_note: Variant A was directionally best, but the crew squats/crouches before stepping and the stretched 12s walk is too slow to read as natural. The fixed 12s terminal-walk constraint is no longer binding; successor must test true-duration 4s, 6s, 8s, and 12s generations plus pipeline lanes.
